message:
test(codec): factor arb_id / arb_optional_id, adopt chrono DateTime<Utc> timestamps

Two related test-only updates to the codec proptest harness.

1. Introduce `arb_id()` and `arb_optional_id()` helpers and replace all
   ad-hoc `0u64..=4096` / `prop::option::of(0u64..=4096)` strategies
   that stood in for pane/tab/window ids throughout
   `proptest_codec_roundtrip.rs`. The per-id range is now defined in one
   place (`0usize..=4096`), so future changes to id-shape only touch
   the helpers, and the arb_* functions read more uniformly:

       fn arb_split_pane() -> impl Strategy<Value = SplitPane> {
           (arb_id(), arb_split_request(), …, arb_optional_id()) …
       }

   Matches the codec's current `pane_id: usize` / `tab_id: usize` /
   `window_id: usize` surface — the previous `u64` ranges were a
   leftover from an older id width that happened to round-trip through
   serde but forced a cast on every strategy.

2. Update `arb_client_info` to build `ClientInfo` with
   `connected_at: chrono::Utc.timestamp_opt(seconds, 0).unwrap()` and
   the same for `last_input`, so the strategy returns genuine
   `DateTime<Utc>` values instead of raw epoch seconds. Adds
   `use chrono::TimeZone;` at the top of the test file and a
   `chrono.workspace = true` entry under `[dev-dependencies]` in
   `frankenterm/codec/Cargo.toml`. This is purely a test-side change;
   production serialization for `ClientInfo` is untouched.

No codec production code is modified, no proptest_config tunables
move, no existing strategies are removed.

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ zstd.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 base91.workspace = true
+chrono.workspace = true
 proptest = "1.8.0"
 serde_json.workspace = true
